75063.subject: Мій хом’як поганого не порадить
75063.body:
Отримати знижку carVertical‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ​Я: Скільки звітів carVertical мені потрібно?​Мій хом’як:​[Hamster] Чесно кажучи, хом’як має рацію.​Тож тримай знижку 25 % на наступний звіт carVertical.Хом’як поганого не порадить.​[Скористатися знижкою 25 %](https://www.carvertical.com/uk/pricing?voucher=hamster25)

Гарного дня!
Команда carVertical і той самий хом’як

 ​​​Більше не бажаєш отримувати розсилку? [Відписатися](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/unsubscribe?a=XjH2sS&c=01JKZJ7BT88Y9PEZRCTNJH2RPY&k=bed91e1ebf7eb74f0ab695336d6b95cd&se=novosadovoleg%40gmail.com&m=01KVW9EEFSDEB2ZZETJ1SB5Z7R&r=01KVZASWEDXH6QWVKWRQ7JF7V9)CV Group, UAB Aukštaičių g. 7 Вільнюс, Литва  CS_ID:uk

Fear and Greed is at
18
(Extreme
Fear)
and BTC slipped to
$61K
this morning. The primary catalyst for yesterday's drop was a 10%
crash in global AI stocks originating in Seoul that swept through
semiconductors and into crypto. Bitcoin moved in tandem with tech
as investors rotated out of high-valuation sectors, with AI stock
weakness turning the day broadly risk-off.

BTC is now testing the $60K psychological floor for the second
time this month. Five converging pressures are in play
simultaneously. Patience is the word analysts keep using.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Trump Just Blocked a CBDC Ban From Becoming Law

President Trump canceled the signing of a major housing bill
on June 24, putting a provision barring the Federal Reserve from
issuing a CBDC until 2030 on hold. The bill had passed the Senate
85-5 and the House 358-32 just days earlier.

Trump linked the cancellation to unrelated voting legislation.

What exception did the housing bill's CBDC ban carve out for
stablecoins?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/Bb8cDArObr5aQ1cv6aHTng~~/AAQRxRA~/bOPUgnJ6ST7QlPZRqaruXU3kNrPvHmiANONq2Dv8ZSX2TNKrS5XeHTbdaQ60o8hD7KGc5GIZnV_qQrNmZqrGf1h7sPqtlN7aPpZVYNZ_2Ab0ZdKBkJ2NlOJ1-3mwzEuHhvua4TRmVt7jEU9HezdRcDPlCLTKr4w-CgQCDGY3gyU~ )
   Bitcoin Is Testing the Four-Year Cycle Again

Bitcoin fell below $60K on June 24 for the second time this
month. ETF issuer 21S
